mapper.select: SELECT S.SEAT_ID , S.VENUE_ID , S.SEAT_ROW , S.SEAT_NO , S.SEAT_GRADE , S.USE_YN , V.VENUE_NM FROM SEAT S LEFT JOIN VENUE V ON S.VENUE_ID = V.VENUE_ID WHERE S.SEAT_ID = #{seatId}

SELECT S.SEAT_ID , S.VENUE_ID , S.SEAT_ROW , S.SEAT_NO , S.SEAT_GRADE , S.USE_YN , V.VENUE_NM FROM SEAT S LEFT JOIN VENUE V ON S.VENUE_ID = V.VENUE_ID WHERE 1=1
AND S.SEAT_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND S.SEAT_ROW LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY S.VENUE_ID ASC, S.SEAT_ROW ASC, S.SEAT_NO ASC OFFSET #{firstIndex} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{recordCountPerPage} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SEAT S LEFT JOIN VENUE V ON S.VENUE_ID = V.VENUE_ID WHERE 1=1
AND S.SEAT_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND S.SEAT_ROW LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
SELECT SEAT_ID , VENUE_ID , SEAT_ROW , SEAT_NO , SEAT_GRADE , USE_YN FROM SEAT WHERE VENUE_ID = #{venueId} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SEAT_ROW ASC, SEAT_NO ASC
